title: Luffy on Amazon Lily: Rising Conflict
description: In the Amazon Lily storyline, this section centers on Boa Hancock, Whitebeard, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #14 as the scene develops across pages 6–9.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: We've found them!!! Margaret is uninjured!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The "Man" is there too!!! Take him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If we stay here for too long

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yes, it seems you are quite strong...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Sorry, Lady HebiHime won't be coming out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: men, men! Animals with no dignity!!

dialogue.speaker: Boa Hancock
dialogue.text: we've told you a thousand times!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: "I will immediately comply with the summons."
